plugins.name: slopslap
plugins.description: Repairs prose carrying high editorial cost (genericness, unsupported claims, synthetic cadence, obscured responsibility, voice discontinuity) while preserving meaning, technical accuracy, requirements, uncertainty, and intentional voice. Ships the slopslap judgment skill and the audit / suggest / apply / voiceprint commands; a live audit -> verify -> suggest -> apply seam with a byte-exact 3-layer verifier and backup-gated atomic apply. Not an AI-authorship detector: it never treats a stylistic tell as a contaminant.
